# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cicd security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-stage Deployment Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v1
        with:
          node-version: '14'
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm install
      - name: Build artifacts
        run: npm run build

  deploy-dev:
    needs: [build-and-deploy]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Download artifacts from build job
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v1
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
      - name: Deploy to dev environment
        run: |
          npm install -g @aws-codeartifact/login
          aws codeartifact login --tool npm --repository my-repo --domain my-domain
          npm install
          npm run deploy-dev

  deploy-prod:
    needs: [build-and-deploy]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Download artifacts from build job
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v1
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
      - name: Deploy to prod environment
        run: |
          npm install -g @aws-codeartifact/login
          aws codeartifact login --tool npm --repository my-repo --domain my-domain
          npm install
          npm run deploy-prod

  deploy-staging:
    needs: [build-and-deploy]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Download artifacts from build job
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v1
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
      - name: Deploy to staging environment
        run: |
          npm install -g @aws-codeartifact/login
          aws codeartifact login --tool npm --repository my-repo --domain my-domain
          npm install
          npm run deploy-staging

  deploy-qa:
    needs: [build-and-deploy]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Download artifacts from build job
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v1
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
      - name: Deploy to qa environment
        run: |
          npm install -g @aws-codeartifact/login
          aws codeartifact login --tool npm --repository my-repo --domain my-domain
          npm install
          npm run deploy-qa

  deploy-prod-final:
    needs: [build-and-deploy]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Download artifacts from build job
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v1
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
      - name: Deploy to prod environment (final)
        run: |
          npm install -g @aws-codeartifact/login
          aws codeartifact login --tool npm --repository my-repo --domain my-domain
          npm install
          npm run deploy-prod-final

secrets:
  AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID: ${{ secrets.AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID }}
  AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY: ${{ secrets.AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY }}
  CODEARTIFACT_DOMAIN: ${{ secrets.CODEARTIFACT_DOMAIN }}
  CODEARTIFACT_REPO: ${{ secrets.CODEARTIFACT_REPO }}

env:
  AWS_REGION: 'us-west-2'
